The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] '''Scout''' was aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used for [[Navy/Legends|naval]] scout and assault operations. These vessels were effective defense against all other enemy seaborne craft, however not very effective at destroying buildings. They could be upgraded with further armaments and armor.

{{Veh-stub}}
